'''Corulag bamboo''' was a kind of fast-growing [[Bamboo/Legends|bamboo]] plant. [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag's]] southern continents were covered in bamboo forests.<ref name="CatCW" />

{{Flora-stub}}

*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{Mo}}
